scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@marketing-os/database --if-present && npm run build --workspace=@marketing-os/shared-types --if-present && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build --workspace=@marketing-os/database && npm run build --workspace=@marketing-os/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=web && npm run build --workspace=api
